UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information within the EduCompetence Flow application. This entity stores personal and institutional details for a server at UNEB.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity. This corresponds to the Firebase Authentication User ID (UID).

name.description: The full name of the user.

registrationNumber.description: The unique institutional registration number ('matrícula') of the user at UNEB.

email.description: The email address of the user, primarily used for login and notifications.

roleId.description: Reference to the user's formal role at UNEB (e.g., 'Técnico Universitário'). (Relationship: Role 1:N UserProfile)

academicBackground.description: A description of the user's highest academic formation or degree.

unebTenure.description: The number of years the user has been working at UNEB.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when this user profile record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when this user profile record was last updated.

UserWorkContext.title: UserWorkContext
UserWorkContext.description: Stores a user's current work context, including their organizational unit, sector, and any formal function they hold.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserWorkContext entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile this work context belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:1 UserWorkContext)

unitId.description: Reference to the organizational unit where the user works. (Relationship: Unit 1:N UserWorkContext)

sectorId.description: Reference to the specific sector within the unit where the user works. (Relationship: Sector 1:N UserWorkContext)

hasFormalRole.description: Indicates whether the user possesses a formal function within their work context.

formalRoleDescription.description: Description of the formal function held by the user, if 'hasFormalRole' is true.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when this work context record was created or last updated.

Competency.title: Competency
Competency.description: Defines a specific competency required or desired for professional development.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Competency entity.

name.description: The name of the competency (e.g., 'Comunicação Eficaz').

description.description: A detailed description of what the competency entails.

category.description: The category to which this competency belongs (e.g., 'Comportamental', 'Técnica').

ExpectedCompetencyLevel.title: ExpectedCompetencyLevel
ExpectedCompetencyLevel.description: Defines the expected level for a specific competency for a given role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ExpectedCompetencyLevel entity.

roleId.description: Reference to the Role for which this competency level is expected. (Relationship: Role 1:N ExpectedCompetencyLevel)

competencyId.description: Reference to the Competency for which the level is expected. (Relationship: Competency 1:N ExpectedCompetencyLevel)

expectedLevel.description: The numerical level (1 to 3) expected for this competency within the specified role.

description.description: A description of what attaining this expected level signifies for the given competency and role.

UserCompetencyAssessment.title: UserCompetencyAssessment
UserCompetencyAssessment.description: Records a user's self-assessment of their current level for a specific competency.

id.description: Unique identifier for this specific competency assessment. In Firestore, this will be the competencyId when stored under a user's assessments subcollection. (Relationship: Competency 1:N UserCompetencyAssessment)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who performed the self-assessment. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserCompetencyAssessment)

level.description: The self-assessed level (1 to 3) for the competency.

assessmentDate.description: Date and time when the self-assessment was performed.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: Details about a course available in the catalog for recommendation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Course entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the course content and objectives.

provider.description: The organization or platform offering the course.

durationHours.description: The estimated duration of the course in hours.

link.description: The URL to the official course page or enrollment link.

category.description: The category of the course (e.g., 'Desenvolvimento Pessoal', 'Tecnologia').

CourseCompetency.title: CourseCompetency
CourseCompetency.description: Establishes a many-to-many relationship between a Course and the Competencies it helps develop.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CourseCompetency linkage entity.

courseId.description: Reference to the Course. (Relationship: Course N:N Competency)

competencyId.description: Reference to the Competency. (Relationship: Course N:N Competency)

improvesLevel.description: The target competency level (1 to 3) that this course aims to help a user achieve or improve towards.

Recommendation.title: Recommendation
Recommendation.description: Records a specific course recommendation generated for a user based on their competency gaps.

id.description: Unique identifier for this specific recommendation instance.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who received this recommendation. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Recommendation)

competencyId.description: Reference to the Competency for which this course is recommended to bridge a gap. (Relationship: Competency 1:N Recommendation)

courseId.description: Reference to the Course that is being recommended. (Relationship: Course 1:N Recommendation)

assessedLevel.description: The user's self-assessed level for the competency at the time this recommendation was generated.

expectedLevel.description: The expected level for the competency based on the user's role at the time this recommendation was generated.

recommendationDate.description: Date and time when the recommendation was generated.

RecommendationFeedback.title: RecommendationFeedback
RecommendationFeedback.description: Captures user feedback (like/dislike) on a specific course recommendation.

id.description: Unique identifier for this specific feedback entry.

recommendationId.description: Reference to the Recommendation this feedback is for. (Relationship: Recommendation 1:N RecommendationFeedback)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who provided the feedback. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N RecommendationFeedback)

feedbackType.description: The type of feedback provided ('liked' or 'disliked').

feedbackDate.description: Date and time when the feedback was provided.

comment.description: Optional text comment provided by the user regarding the recommendation.

CompletedCourse.title: CompletedCourse
CompletedCourse.description: Records a course that a user has successfully completed, including an optional certificate.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CompletedCourse record.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who completed the course. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N CompletedCourse)

courseId.description: Reference to the Course that was completed. (Relationship: Course 1:N CompletedCourse)

completionDate.description: The date when the course was completed.

certificateUrl.description: A URL to the stored PDF certificate of completion.

feedback.description: Optional free-text feedback or review provided by the user for the completed course.

Unit.title: Unit
Unit.description: Represents an organizational unit within the University of the State of Bahia (UNEB).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Unit entity.

name.description: The official name of the organizational unit (e.g., 'Departamento de Educação').

Sector.title: Sector
Sector.description: Represents a specific sector or department, typically within an organizational unit, at UNEB.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Sector entity.

name.description: The name of the sector (e.g., 'Recursos Humanos').

Role.title: Role
Role.description: Defines a formal job role or position for technical-administrative servers at UNEB.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Role entity.

name.description: The name of the role (e.g., 'Técnico Universitário', 'Analista Universitário').

description.description: A description of the main responsibilities and duties associated with this role.

definition.description: Stores user profile information, uniquely identified by their Firebase Authentication UID. This collection forms the root for all user-specific data. Owner is `userId`.

A singleton subcollection storing the user's current work context. The document ID 'current' is fixed. Authorization is path-based, with `userId` implicitly owning this record. Includes denormalized 'userId' field (implicitly by path).

Stores a user's self-assessment for a specific competency. The document ID is the `competencyId`. Authorization is path-based, with `userId` implicitly owning these records. Includes denormalized 'userId' field (implicitly by path).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the UserProfile (Firebase Auth UID).

params.name: competencyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Competency being assessed.

definition.description: Records a specific course recommendation generated for a user. Authorization is path-based, with `userId` implicitly owning these records. Includes denormalized 'userId' field (implicitly by path).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the UserProfile (Firebase Auth UID).

params.name: recommendationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the recommendation.

definition.description: Captures user feedback on a specific course recommendation. Authorization is path-based, with `userId` implicitly owning these records. Includes denormalized 'userId' field (implicitly by path).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the UserProfile (Firebase Auth UID).

params.name: recommendationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent recommendation.

params.name: feedbackId
params.description: The unique identifier for this feedback entry.

definition.description: Records a course completed by a user. Authorization is path-based, with `userId` implicitly owning these records. Includes denormalized 'userId' field (implicitly by path).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the UserProfile (Firebase Auth UID).

params.name: completedCourseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the completed course record.

definition.description: Global catalog of competencies. Read-only for all authenticated users; writeable by administrators only.

params.name: competencyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the competency.

definition.description: Defines the expected competency level for a specific role. Read-only for all authenticated users; writeable by administrators only.

params.name: expectedCompetencyLevelId
params.description: The unique identifier for the expected competency level definition.

definition.description: Global catalog of courses. Read-only for all authenticated users; writeable by administrators only.

params.name: courseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the course.

definition.description: Establishes a many-to-many relationship between a Course and the Competencies it helps develop. Read-only for all authenticated users; writeable by administrators only.

params.name: courseCompetencyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the course-competency linkage.

definition.description: Global list of organizational units. Read-only for all authenticated users; writeable by administrators only.

params.name: unitId
params.description: The unique identifier for the organizational unit.

definition.description: Global list of sectors within organizational units. Read-only for all authenticated users; writeable by administrators only.

params.name: sectorId
params.description: The unique identifier for the sector.

definition.description: Global list of formal job roles. Read-only for all authenticated users; writeable by administrators only.

params.name: roleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the job role.

definition.description: Dedicated collection for administrative role assignments. The existence of a document here (with `userId` as ID) grants administrative privileges, following DBAC 'Existence over Content'. Read/write by administrators only.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Auth UID of a user with administrative privileges.

definition.description: Dedicated collection for researcher role assignments. The existence of a document here (with `userId` as ID) grants researcher privileges to view all user data, following DBAC 'Existence over Content'. Read/write by administrators only.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Auth UID of a user with researcher privileges.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for EduCompetence Flow is designed around two core principles: strong user data isolation via path-based ownership and clear segregation of global, reference data. All user-specific information (profiles, work context, competency assessments, recommendations, and completed courses) is organized under a top-level `users` collection, with each user's data rooted at `users/{userId}/`, where `userId` directly corresponds to the Firebase Authentication UID (`request.auth.uid`). This critical design choice directly ensures **Authorization Independence (CRITICAL)** as security rules for user data can simply check `request.auth.uid == userId` without needing to perform `get()` operations on parent documents to determine ownership or permissions. This prevents complex, brittle, and non-atomic rules.

Global, read-only data (e.g., `competencies`, `courses`, `units`, `sectors`, `roles`, `expectedCompetencyLevels`, `courseCompetencies`) are stored in dedicated top-level collections. This **Structural Segregation** ensures that all documents within these collections share the same security posture (authenticated read for all users, admin-writeable). This separation eliminates the need for `get()` calls for shared resources and simplifies rules, making them highly debuggable.

**DBAC (No Custom Claims)** is implemented using dedicated 'role' collections: `roles_admin/{userId}` and `roles_researcher/{userId}`. The mere existence of a document for a specific `userId` in these collections grants the respective role. This allows security rules to use efficient `exists()` checks for role verification, rather than relying on custom claims or complex database queries within rules.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters)** is fully supported by this design. For user-specific data, `list` operations are inherently secure because the `userId` in the path precisely matches the authenticated user (`request.auth.uid`). A user can only list their own sub-collections, and the rules enforce this explicitly, ensuring that no unauthorized data is ever returned. For global reference data, `list` operations on collections like `/competencies` or `/courses` are secure because all documents within these collections are uniformly accessible (read-only for authenticated users). The system does not mix public and private data in the same collection that would require rules to 'filter' the results. The researcher role, enabled by `roles_researcher/{userId}`, allows a researcher to `list` all users and their associated data because their authorization implicitly grants read access to all `users/{userId}` paths, again without rules needing to filter at query time.
